simulation._comment_defaultMaxPositions: Default maximum number of open positions
simulation._comment_confirmBeforeExecute: Prompt for confirmation before executing trades

scenarios._comment_testScenarios: Available market scenarios for testing strategies

risk._comment_minConfidence: Minimum AI signal confidence required to execute (0.0-1.0)
risk._comment_maxRiskPerTrade: Maximum risk per individual trade (0.05 = 5% of account)
risk._comment_maxTotalRisk: Maximum total portfolio risk (0.30 = 30% margin used)

logging._comment_resultsDir: Directory path for saving simulation results

performance._comment_calculateSharpeRatio: Calculate Sharpe ratio for performance evaluation

mock._comment_signalInterval: Interval between signals in milliseconds (10000 = 10 seconds)
mock._comment_confidenceRange: AI confidence range for mock signals (min-max)

real._comment_apiKey: OpenRouter API key for real AI signals
real._comment_model: AI model name for signal generation
real._comment_maxRetries: Maximum API retry attempts on failure
real._comment_timeout: API request timeout in milliseconds (30000 = 30 seconds)
